hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *.py) cd backend && uv run ruff check --fix --quiet "../$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac
case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *.ts|*.tsx) cd frontend && pnpm exec eslint --quiet "../$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac
case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in docs/*.md|knowledge/*.md|*.md) uv run python -m backend.app.integrity --plugin doc_audit --no-augment 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac
case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *SKILL.md|*skill.yaml) make skill-check 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac

case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in scripts/*|*pyproject.toml|*Makefile|.claude/settings.json|*skill.yaml) uv run python -m backend.app.integrity --plugin config_registry --no-augment --check 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac
